text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 153 

OP_SRVC_IND_CD 

LABEL: Outpatient services/ambulatory surgical care indicator code 

DESCRIPTION: The code indicating whether the beneficiary has received outpatient services, ambulatory surgical care, 
or both. 

SHORT NAME: OPSRVCCD 

LONG NAME: OP_SRVC_IND_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = No outpatient services/ambulatory surgical care (revenue code other
